items.name: D-1 Tactical Modular Helmet
items.description:
Join the Group for more UGC like this: https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about
front face optic: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124443271693649/D1-Armored-Juggernaut-Optic
frame version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/109152511590262/D-1-Tactical-Modular-Helmet

The D1-VANGUARD division understands that some days you want to feel the breeze of a gloomy warzone, and other days you'd prefer not to have a breeze enter your skull. This modular system offers the best of both worlds. Start with the lightweight tactical frame for maximum acoustic awareness during urban pacification, then snap on the heavy ballistic plating when the high-caliber greetings start flying. It’s corporate-mandated safety that actually looks intimidating in the company newsletter. Remember: At OSU Corp, a helmet is cheaper than a new employee.

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.
